_note: Shared account mapping file — used by import_legacy.py (--import-mapping) and check_account.py (--account-file). Each entry maps a Vulcain code to an ERP account. Fields: vulcain_code (required), erp_code (override auto-matching; null = exclude), asset_code (import_legacy only: ERP asset code to attach as tiers_uuid), vulcain_label / vulcain_side / erp_name (informational, set by check_account export), count (set by import_legacy export), note (free text). KNOWN DESIGN DIFFERENCES: (1) Flight revenues: Vulcain records net (discounts included), ERP records gross (discount in account 6066). (2) Member contributions: Vulcain 7561 (consolidated 50,975€) splits automatically in ERP → 7561 + 7065 (51,150€, diff ~175€). (3) Cost allocation: ERP uses accounts 902, 921-923 (no Vulcain equivalents).

mappings.vulcain_label: Immo. tondeuse B et S 3 ans

mappings.note: Old-rate winch provision sub-account, liquidated into 151820000/151801 (same TREUIL asset) via num_ecriture=6549
Flight operating/participation fees. ERP splits this into 7065 + participation accounts; Vulcain uses 7561 for combined contributions. Expected diff when comparing against Vulcain 756100000.

Flight cell hours. Vulcain records net price (discounts included). ERP records gross price in 7062 + separate discount offset in 6066. Reconcile as: Vulcain 7061 (all flight types) ≈ ERP (7062+7063+7064+7065+7066 - 6066).
Member contributions split automatically in ERP: ≤50€ → 7561 (10,950€), >50€ → 7065 (40,200€). Reconciles correctly: Vulcain 50,975€ ≈ ERP 7561+7065 51,150€ (diff 175€, <0.4%).

consolidations.name: Member contributions split
consolidations.description: Vulcain 7561 (consolidated) is automatically split in ERP: ≤50€ → 7561, >50€ → 7065

consolidations.name: Flight revenues with discount
consolidations.description: Flight revenues (7062-7066) are net of discount. ERP records gross + discount offset in 6066. Reconcile: Vulcain flight revenues ≈ ERP (7062+7063+7064+7065+7066) - 6066
